calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Continued To Oct-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Mohibullah Ahmadzai 916-891-9266 Plaintiff in pro Per.
Sam Schleier, Esq. 949-241-9804 Bowman and Brooke LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Mr. Schleier does not have anything further to ass to the court's analysis of the TR. Mr. Ahmadzai presents arguments; panic attacks, hearing impairmenr, threats to safety, requests to deny motion and allow additional time. Mr. Schleier responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant Uber Technology, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay.

Taken Under Submission.*** (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
